title: XOR With a Twist
description:
XOR encryption uses a key to scramble data.

Your task: Decrypt the following hex string using a single-byte XOR key:

3a2d301d2b311d322d35273024372e

 The flag format is FLAG{decrypted_text}
hints: This string is hex encoded — but converting it to text won't give you the flag directly
The data has been scrambled using a single character as a key
Use 'From Hex' then 'XOR Brute Force' in CyberChef and look through the results for readable text
